race.description: The Autumn Sun At Arrowfield Hcp
race.comment: SHANGRI LA IMPACT (5) is a tough mare with a solid win record. Good win first-up, then ran on well with the 59kg to finish an unlucky third over 1600m at Newcastle. Likely to push forward here and take holding out. SACRIFY (2) improving gelding who sprinted well first-up with a slashing third over 1500m at Hawkesbury. Can get cover from the gate and looks up to this.  KOOLIBAH (7) has improved sharply in her first prep winning her last two races by big margins in easier grade. Maps well and expected to figure prominently. KAAZI (6) has been in the market at his last couple of starts. Solid latest running fourth at Rosehill. Can improve.
